    private WorkBatch
    CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext.getNewBatchBlocking()
    Retrieves a new WorkBatch from the global pool, blocking until one is available.
    (package private) WorkBatch
    CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext.getOrCreateBatch()
    Returns the current WorkBatch for this thread, obtaining a new one from the central pool if one doesn't exist.

    Obtains a WorkBatch to process, using a work-stealing strategy.
    WorkBatch

    Retrieves a WorkBatch from the queue using a non-blocking, relaxed operation.

    Replaces the CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext.currentBatch with a new one obtained from the central pool.

    Flushes a WorkBatch to the CombinationQueueArray, blocking if necessary until successful.
    private final boolean
    CombinationGeneratorTask.flushBatchFast(WorkBatch batch)
    Flushes a batch of combinations to an available queue, employing a backoff strategy if all queues are temporarily full.
